_meta.description: Cells whose company investor presentations / annual reports were swept page-by-page (scripts/ingest/ppt-sweep.ts + reviewed transcription, 2026-06-11) and genuinely do not print the number. Rendered grey as 'Not found in PPT' (Neha, 2026-06-11). Applies only while the cell has no sourced value — a statutory filing that later lands always wins. Cells whose documents are merely NOT YET FETCHED (e.g. Care Q1FY26 deck, Star FY24 AR, ABCL Q1FY25 deck) are deliberately NOT here — they stay red and on the agent fetch worklist.

care-health::eom_igaap::FY26.reason: Not found in the PPT — the FY26 investor deck states EoM-regulation compliance but prints no ratio; the number lands with Care's FY26 annual report when published.

manipalcigna::eom_igaap::FY23.reason: Not found in any PPT/annual report — ManipalCigna's ARs carry only a policy note on Expenses of Management (IRDAI granted FY24 forbearance and directed EoM down to 38% in FY25); the ratio itself is not printed.

manipalcigna::eom_igaap::FY24.reason: Not found in any PPT/annual report — ManipalCigna's ARs carry only a policy note on Expenses of Management (IRDAI granted FY24 forbearance and directed EoM down to 38% in FY25); the ratio itself is not printed.

manipalcigna::pat_ifrs::FY23.reason: Not found in any PPT — ManipalCigna (unlisted JV) publishes no IFRS/Ind-AS investor figures; both staged annual reports and every deck were searched page-by-page.

star-health::pat_ifrs::FY23.searched: ppt-sweep 2026-06-11 (Star FY25 AR p18-19 + all staged decks)
